certifications.title: CCNA Introduction to Networking
certifications.description: Fundamentals of computer networks: OSI and TCP/IP models, IP addressing, routing, switching and communication protocols.

certifications.title: Claude 101
certifications.description: Introduction to Claude: prompt engineering, practical use cases and best practices for interacting with AI models.

certifications.title: Linux Essentials
certifications.description: Fundamentals of the Linux operating system: filesystem navigation, process management, permissions, shell scripting and essential commands.

certifications.title: Agile Scrum Basics
certifications.description: Agile principles and values, Scrum framework, roles (Product Owner, Scrum Master, Dev Team), sprint planning and backlog management.
